sentences.target: On boit un canon au café.

translations.fr: On boit un canon au café.
translations.en: We’re having a glass of wine at the café.
translations.es: Estamos tomando una copa de vino en la cafetería.
translations.de: Wir trinken ein Glas Wein im Café.
translations.it: Stiamo bevendo un bicchiere di vino al bar.
translations.ko: 우리는 카페에서 와인 한 잔을 마시고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆喝一杯红酒。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店飲杯紅酒。
translations.ru: Мы пьём бокал вина в кафе.
translations.pt: Estamos tomando uma taça de vinho no café.
translations.he: אנחנו שותים כוס יין בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang uống một ly rượu vang ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: نحن نشرب كأسًا من النبيذ في المقهى.
translations.nl: We drinken een glas wijn in het café.
translations.uk: Ми п’ємо келих вина в кафе.
translations.hu: Egy pohár bort iszunk a kávézóban.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में एक गिलास वाइन पी रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πίνουμε ένα ποτήρι κρασί στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Vi drikker et glass vin på kafé.
translations.id: Kami sedang minum segelas anggur di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi dricker ett glas vin på kaféet.
translations.ro: Bem un pahar de vin la cafenea.
translations.cs: Dáváme si sklenku vína v kavárně.
translations.da: Vi drikker et glas vin på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェでワインを一杯飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; colloquially used for 'we'.
3rd person singular present of 'boire'; agrees with 'on'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a count noun.
Masculine singular noun; here in argot means a glass of (usually red) wine; direct object of 'boit'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces a locative complement.
Masculine singular noun; here denotes the place (bar/coffeehouse) and is the object of 'à'.

sentences.target: Ce musée expose un ancien canon.

translations.fr: Ce musée expose un ancien canon.
translations.en: This museum displays an old cannon.
translations.es: Este museo exhibe un cañón antiguo.
translations.de: Dieses Museum stellt eine alte Kanone aus.
translations.it: Questo museo espone un vecchio cannone.
translations.ko: 이 박물관은 오래된 대포를 전시하고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这座博物馆展出一门古老的火炮。
translations.yue: 呢間博物館展出一門舊大炮。
translations.pt: Este museu expõe um canhão antigo.
translations.tr: Bu müze eski bir top sergiliyor.
translations.vi: Bảo tàng này trưng bày một khẩu đại bác cổ.
translations.nl: Dit museum toont een oud kanon.
translations.hu: Ez a múzeum egy régi ágyút állít ki.
translations.hi: यह संग्रहालय एक पुरानी तोप प्रदर्शित करता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το μουσείο εκθέτει ένα παλιό κανόνι.
translations.nb: Dette museet viser en gammel kanon.
translations.id: Museum ini memamerkan sebuah meriam tua.
translations.sv: Det här museet ställer ut en gammal kanon.
translations.ro: Acest muzeu expune un tun vechi.
translations.da: Dette museum udstiller en gammel kanon.
translations.ja: この博物館は古い大砲を展示しています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'musée'.
Masculine singular noun functioning as subject.
3rd person singular present of a transitive verb meaning 'to exhibit/display'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Adjective, masculine singular; prenominal here; contextually 'old/antique' (not 'former').
Concrete noun meaning an artillery piece; direct object of 'expose'.

translations.es: Este canon de belleza me molesta.
translations.it: Questo ideale di bellezza mi infastidisce.
translations.zh-Hans: 这种审美标准让我很烦。
translations.yue: 呢種審美標準令我好煩。
translations.pt: Este padrão de beleza me irrita.
translations.vi: Chuẩn mực vẻ đẹp này làm tôi bực mình.
translations.hi: यह सौंदर्य मानक मुझे परेशान करता है.
translations.el: Αυτό το πρότυπο ομορφιάς με εκνευρίζει.
translations.id: Standar kecantikan ini membuat saya kesal.
translations.ro: Acest standard de frumusețe mă enervează.
translations.ja: この美の基準にはうんざりします。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'canon'.
Noun; in the fixed expression 'canon de beauté', means 'standard/ideal' (norm).
Preposition linking the head noun 'canon' to the complement 'beauté' to form a compound.
Feminine abstract noun; complement of 'de'.
3rd person singular present; clitic object pronoun 'me' (m') attached before the verb; subject is 'Ce canon de beauté'.

sentences.target: Je prends un canon avec Paul.

translations.fr: Je prends un canon avec Paul.
translations.en: I’m having a glass of wine with Paul.
translations.es: Estoy tomando una copa de vino con Paul.
translations.de: Ich trinke ein Glas Wein mit Paul.
translations.it: Sto bevendo un bicchiere di vino con Paul.
translations.ko: 폴과 와인 한 잔을 마시고 있어요.
translations.ru: Я пью бокал вина с Полом.
translations.pt: Estou tomando uma taça de vinho com Paul.
translations.he: אני שותה כוס יין עם פול.
translations.tr: Paul ile bir kadeh şarap içiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang uống một ly rượu vang với Paul.
translations.ar: أنا أشرب كأسًا من النبيذ مع بول.
translations.nl: Ik drink een glas wijn met Paul.
translations.uk: Я п’ю келих вина з Полом.
translations.hi: मैं पॉल के साथ एक गिलास वाइन पी रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πίνω ένα ποτήρι κρασί με τον Πολ.
translations.nb: Jeg drikker et glass vin med Paul.
translations.id: Saya minum segelas anggur dengan Paul.
translations.sv: Jag dricker ett glas vin med Paul.
translations.ro: Beau un pahar de vin cu Paul.
translations.cs: Dávám si sklenku vína s Paulem.
translations.da: Jeg drikker et glas vin med Paul.
translations.ja: ポールとワインを一杯飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present of 'prendre'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Argot sense: a glass of wine; direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Proper noun (person's name); object of 'avec'.
